title: lobelia × rogersii
intro: Lobelia × rogersii, also known as Lobelia, is a flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, specifically a hybrid of the species Lobelia erinus and Lobelia laxa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lobelia include relief from asthma, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Lobelia is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and its herbal preparations have been used to treat various ailments, including anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms.
